title: Couldn't add panel error when startint mRemoteNG 1.8.10 (current latest stable)
author: zgabi
body_snippet: I exported the connection from the "original" mRemoteNG 1.76.20.24615 to an xml configutazion file. (contains RDP. VNC and SSH connections) An then imported it in yout latest version. After some restart I got the error message.

comments.author: zgabi
comments.snippet:
When I click OK, the program closes, I can't start it anymore.

Edit: It started after some minutes.
Then I closed it again.
Then start => not responding for a minute again.
